strengths: Possesses over 15 years of software and infrastructure engineering experience paired with a BS in Computer Science from MIT, fully satisfying the core baseline requirements.
Demonstrates direct, hands-on fluency in building AI and cloud technologies, evidenced by his recent work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and Kubernetes-deployed platforms.

Brings the preferred entrepreneurial experience as a Founder (GISCollective), combined with a strong track record of technical evangelism through conference talks, workshops, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks the preferred Master's degree or PhD specifically in an AI-related field, possessing instead a BS in Computer Science.
While highly experienced as a Staff Engineer and Founder, he lacks explicit Director-level corporate titles, which may require adaptation to the scale of a Principal IC in a large enterprise.
The resume heavily emphasizes hands-on software craftsmanship and product building, with less explicit evidence of advising strategic corporate customers on technology adoption.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly compelling candidate for this Principal Engineer role, seamlessly blending over 15 years of deep technical engineering experience with the preferred entrepreneurial background as a founder. His recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators demonstrates the exact cloud and AI builder fluency required to identify and test strategic opportunities for differentiation. Furthermore, his MIT Computer Science education and extensive history of hosting technical workshops and conference talks prove he possesses the authoritative voice and communication skills necessary to inspire teams and evangelize cutting-edge AI strategies.
